channel.title: cmwen.github.io Podcast
channel.description: Automatically generated podcasts from blog posts covering software development, AI, and tech productivity.
channel.itunes:author: Min Wen
channel.itunes:summary: Automatically generated podcasts from blog posts covering software development, AI, and tech productivity.

item.title: 用 Microsoft Teams 頻道溝通：擺脫群聊混亂，讓協作更專注
item.description: 群聊像洪流？用頻道把資訊集中、討論可追蹤、任務可落地，團隊從被動救火變主動規劃。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 群聊像洪流？用頻道把資訊集中、討論可追蹤、任務可落地，團隊從被動救火變主動規劃。

item.title: Streamline Your Workflow: Why Your Team Needs to Embrace Microsoft Teams Channels
item.description: Ditch the group chat chaos and streamline your team communication with the power of Microsoft Teams Channels.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Ditch the group chat chaos and streamline your team communication with the power of Microsoft Teams Channels.

item.title: I'm an ISTJ-A: The Reliable Rock (But Maybe a Little Set in My Ways)
item.description: Ever get called the dependable one? There's a chance you might be an ISTJ-A, just like me! Let's explore what this Myers-Briggs type means and what it's like to live in this organized, logical mind.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Ever get called the dependable one? There's a chance you might be an ISTJ-A, just like me! Let's explore what this Myers-Briggs type means and what it's like to live in this organized, logical mind.

item.title: Finding the Documentation Sweet Spot: Striking a Balance in Dev-Business Collaboration
item.description: Drowning in documents? There's a better way! Explore strategies for achieving a documentation sweet spot, fostering clear communication, and streamlining Dev-Business collaboration.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Drowning in documents? There's a better way! Explore strategies for achieving a documentation sweet spot, fostering clear communication, and streamlining Dev-Business collaboration.

item.title: 文件剛剛好：在研發與業務之間找到溝通甜蜜點
item.description: 文件寫太多會淹沒，寫太少又容易失真——這篇談如何用「協作型文件 + 以程式碼為準」的方式，讓研發與業務高效對齊。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 文件寫太多會淹沒，寫太少又容易失真——這篇談如何用「協作型文件 + 以程式碼為準」的方式，讓研發與業務高效對齊。

item.title: Inbox Zen: Unleash the Power of Gmail Aliases with "+"
item.description: Feeling overwhelmed by subscriptions and service emails? Discover the magic of Gmail aliases! Learn how to use the "+" symbol to create unique email addresses and organize your inbox for ultimate zen.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Feeling overwhelmed by subscriptions and service emails? Discover the magic of Gmail aliases! Learn how to use the "+" symbol to create unique email addresses and organize your inbox for ultimate zen.

item.title: 收信禪：用 Gmail "+" 別名，把訂閱與服務郵件一次理順
item.description: 透過 Gmail 別名（username+tag@gmail.com）快速分流訂閱、清單與服務通知，搭配過濾器打造乾淨信箱。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 透過 Gmail 別名（username+tag@gmail.com）快速分流訂閱、清單與服務通知，搭配過濾器打造乾淨信箱。

item.title: 在 VS Code 用 Copilot Fetch 做 RAG：輕量、在地、可迭代
item.description: 示範如何在 VS Code 內用 Copilot Fetch 做文件檢索增強生成（RAG），從最小可行流程到可重複的查找與回覆。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 示範如何在 VS Code 內用 Copilot Fetch 做文件檢索增強生成（RAG），從最小可行流程到可重複的查找與回覆。

item.title: Learning in the AI Era: From Reactive to Proactive
item.description: How AI is revolutionizing learning by tailoring content to your specific needs. Discover the benefits and potential pitfalls of proactive learning in the AI era.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: How AI is revolutionizing learning by tailoring content to your specific needs. Discover the benefits and potential pitfalls of proactive learning in the AI era.

item.title: AI 時代的學習：從被動到主動
item.description: AI 讓學習能依個人化需求調整——更主動、更即時，也更有效率；同時也別忘了保有批判思考。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: AI 讓學習能依個人化需求調整——更主動、更即時，也更有效率；同時也別忘了保有批判思考。

item.title: Understanding LLM Tool Calling in LangChain
item.description: A step-by-step guide to how LLM Tool Calling works in LangChain, complete with a sequence diagram.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A step-by-step guide to how LLM Tool Calling works in LangChain, complete with a sequence diagram.

item.title: LLM 金融應用中的 RDB 與向量資料庫：怎麼選、何時雙軌
item.description: 比較關聯式資料庫與向量資料庫在金融應用中的定位：統計查詢用 RDB、語意搜尋用向量庫，混合才是王道。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 比較關聯式資料庫與向量資料庫在金融應用中的定位：統計查詢用 RDB、語意搜尋用向量庫，混合才是王道。

item.title: RDB vs. Vector DB in LLM Financial Apps: Which to Use and Why Both Matter
item.description: Comparing relational and vector databases for LLM-powered financial apps. Learn when to use each and why a hybrid approach delivers the best results for transaction tracking and analytics.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Comparing relational and vector databases for LLM-powered financial apps. Learn when to use each and why a hybrid approach delivers the best results for transaction tracking and analytics.

item.title: Pre-Reading Prep: Unlock a Book's Secrets Before You Crack It Open
item.description: Tired of dense books? Learn how to leverage large language models (LLMs) and targeted research to gain a head start on understanding a book's core ideas before you even begin reading.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Tired of dense books? Learn how to leverage large language models (LLMs) and targeted research to gain a head start on understanding a book's core ideas before you even begin reading.

item.title: 先學一本書：用 LLM 做預讀，打開重點地圖再開始讀
item.description: 在閱讀前，先用 LLM 與精準查找建立框架與詞彙地圖，提升理解、聚焦重點，讓閱讀更有效率。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 在閱讀前，先用 LLM 與精準查找建立框架與詞彙地圖，提升理解、聚焦重點，讓閱讀更有效率。

item.title: Unlocking the Power of VS Code Copilot: Using #fetch for RAG
item.description: Learn how to leverage VS Code Copilot's #fetch tool to use Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) without coding. Enhance productivity with custom prompts.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Learn how to leverage VS Code Copilot's #fetch tool to use Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) without coding. Enhance productivity with custom prompts.

item.title: Why Modern PostgreSQL is a Game-Changer for AI Agents
item.description: How modern PostgreSQL approaches empower AI agent workflows, making them ideal for local development and embedding-based applications.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: How modern PostgreSQL approaches empower AI agent workflows, making them ideal for local development and embedding-based applications.

item.title: 為什麼現代 PostgreSQL 很適合 AI Agents
item.description: JSONB、pgvector 到雲端託管，PostgreSQL 讓代理工作流同時擁有彈性、可靠與可攜性。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: JSONB、pgvector 到雲端託管，PostgreSQL 讓代理工作流同時擁有彈性、可靠與可攜性。

item.title: Reflections on Upgrading to GitHub Copilot Pro
item.description: A personal account of transitioning from enterprise Copilot to Copilot Pro, exploring new features, mental models, and strategies for maximizing premium requests.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A personal account of transitioning from enterprise Copilot to Copilot Pro, exploring new features, mental models, and strategies for maximizing premium requests.

item.title: Agentic SDLC 實戰手冊：關鍵節點的人在回路 (HITL)
item.description: 把 LLM Agents 納入軟體開發生命週期：讓代理負責重活與證據蒐集，人在關鍵決策點依據證據審核，兼顧速度與風險。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 把 LLM Agents 納入軟體開發生命週期：讓代理負責重活與證據蒐集，人在關鍵決策點依據證據審核，兼顧速度與風險。

item.title: Agentic SDLC with Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Playbook
item.description: A practical playbook for integrating LLM-based agents into the Software Development Life Cycle while keeping humans in the loop at critical decision points.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A practical playbook for integrating LLM-based agents into the Software Development Life Cycle while keeping humans in the loop at critical decision points.

item.title: Exporting Diffs for LLM Analysis and Codemod Generation
item.description: A practical workflow for exporting git diffs, teaching LLMs the refactor patterns, and generating codemods with test data to apply across repositories.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A practical workflow for exporting git diffs, teaching LLMs the refactor patterns, and generating codemods with test data to apply across repositories.

item.title: 把差異檔變成可重複的重構：輸出 git diff，教會 LLM 產生 codemod 與測試
item.description: 以 git diff 承載「人類意圖」，讓 LLM 學會重構模式，進而產生可驗證的 codemod 與測試資料，用於跨 repo 套用。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 以 git diff 承載「人類意圖」，讓 LLM 學會重構模式，進而產生可驗證的 codemod 與測試資料，用於跨 repo 套用。

item.title: Copilot Pro Tips: Monthly Premium Reset and a Model Bakeoff
item.description: Practical tips for getting the most from GitHub Copilot Pro's monthly premium resets, plus notes from a quick model bakeoff building a mobile-friendly habit tracker.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Practical tips for getting the most from GitHub Copilot Pro's monthly premium resets, plus notes from a quick model bakeoff building a mobile-friendly habit tracker.

item.title: Copilot Pro 心法：月底重置與小型模型比拚（Bakeoff）
item.description: 善用 Copilot Pro 每月 premium 重置，在月末進行多模型小實驗；固定規格做 bakeoff，觀察體驗與可重複性。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 善用 Copilot Pro 每月 premium 重置，在月末進行多模型小實驗；固定規格做 bakeoff，觀察體驗與可重複性。

item.title: 從研究到工程：理解關鍵的轉變
item.description: 探討未證實可能性與工程優化之間的關鍵差異。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 探討未證實可能性與工程優化之間的關鍵差異。

item.title: From Research to Engineering: Understanding the Critical Transition
item.description: Exploring the pivotal difference between unproven possibilities and engineering optimization.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Exploring the pivotal difference between unproven possibilities and engineering optimization.

item.title: AGENTS.md: A New Standard for Unified Coding Agent Instructions
item.description: Learn about AGENTS.md, the new open standard for providing instructions to coding agents, and how it can help you streamline your development workflow.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Learn about AGENTS.md, the new open standard for providing instructions to coding agents, and how it can help you streamline your development workflow.

item.title: The Rise of Personal Forks: Customizing Open Source with AI Coding Agents
item.description: Exploring how AI coding agents are revolutionizing the way we customize open source projects, making personalization accessible even without deep codebase knowledge.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Exploring how AI coding agents are revolutionizing the way we customize open source projects, making personalization accessible even without deep codebase knowledge.

item.title: 使用 KOReader 與 Syncthing 實現跨裝置持續電子書閱讀
item.description: 一篇關於設定完全離線、自我託管的解決方案，以使用 KOReader 和 Syncthing 在多個裝置間同步電子書進度、筆記和重點的指南。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 一篇關於設定完全離線、自我託管的解決方案，以使用 KOReader 和 Syncthing 在多個裝置間同步電子書進度、筆記和重點的指南。

item.title: Continuous E-book Reading Across Devices with KOReader and Syncthing
item.description: A guide to setting up a fully offline, self-hosted solution for synchronizing e-book progress, notes, and highlights across multiple devices using KOReader and Syncthing.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A guide to setting up a fully offline, self-hosted solution for synchronizing e-book progress, notes, and highlights across multiple devices using KOReader and Syncthing.

item.title: From Code to Camera: My Journey into Video Production
item.description: A software developer's first venture into video recording and editing, sharing lessons learned from creating technical demos and discovering the parallels between coding and video production.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A software developer's first venture into video recording and editing, sharing lessons learned from creating technical demos and discovering the parallels between coding and video production.

item.title: GitHub Copilot CLI: Why the Pricing Model Matters
item.description: An examination of GitHub Copilot CLI's premium-only model approach compared to Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI, and why free tier support would make it more practical for everyday use.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: An examination of GitHub Copilot CLI's premium-only model approach compared to Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI, and why free tier support would make it more practical for everyday use.

item.title: GitHub Copilot CLI：為什麼定價模式很重要
item.description: 深入探討 GitHub Copilot CLI 純高級模型策略與 Claude Code 和 OpenAI Codex CLI 的差異，以及為什麼免費層級支援能讓它更實用於日常使用。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 深入探討 GitHub Copilot CLI 純高級模型策略與 Claude Code 和 OpenAI Codex CLI 的差異，以及為什麼免費層級支援能讓它更實用於日常使用。

item.title: Sora 2 與 Suno 的比較：Sora 2 為何可能（或可能不會）成為主流
item.description: 比較 Sora 2 與 Suno 的技術差異、社群機制、法律風險，以及 Sora 2 若要成為文化平台所需的策略選擇。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 比較 Sora 2 與 Suno 的技術差異、社群機制、法律風險，以及 Sora 2 若要成為文化平台所需的策略選擇。

item.title: Sora 2 vs Suno: Why Sora 2 Might — or Might Not — Become Mainstream
item.description: A comparative analysis of Sora 2 and Suno, exploring technical differences, social mechanics, legal risks, and the strategic choices that could make Sora 2 a cultural platform rather than just another tool.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A comparative analysis of Sora 2 and Suno, exploring technical differences, social mechanics, legal risks, and the strategic choices that could make Sora 2 a cultural platform rather than just another tool.

item.title: Copilot CLI vs Codex CLI: Terminal AI Assistants Compared
item.description: A hands-on comparison of GitHub Copilot CLI and OpenAI Codex CLI across shell integration, remote agents, configuration, and documentation experience.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A hands-on comparison of GitHub Copilot CLI and OpenAI Codex CLI across shell integration, remote agents, configuration, and documentation experience.

item.title: Copilot CLI vs Codex CLI：終端機 AI 助手全面比較
item.description: 深入比較 GitHub Copilot CLI 與 OpenAI Codex CLI 在終端機整合、遠端代理、自訂程度與文件體驗上的差異。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 深入比較 GitHub Copilot CLI 與 OpenAI Codex CLI 在終端機整合、遠端代理、自訂程度與文件體驗上的差異。

item.title: Codex CLI MCP Environment Variables: Lessons from the Sandbox
item.description: Why Codex CLI MCP servers need explicit environment variable configuration and how sandboxed runtimes differ from your local shell.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Why Codex CLI MCP servers need explicit environment variable configuration and how sandboxed runtimes differ from your local shell.

item.title: Codex CLI MCP 環境變數：沙盒環境的教訓
item.description: Codex CLI 啟動 MCP 伺服器時不會自動繼承終端機的環境變數，了解沙盒差異並把設定寫進 MCP 配置裡。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Codex CLI 啟動 MCP 伺服器時不會自動繼承終端機的環境變數，了解沙盒差異並把設定寫進 MCP 配置裡。

item.title: 使用 GitHub Releases 搭配 Obtainium 私密發佈 Android App
item.description: 了解如何自簽 Android APK、透過 GitHub Actions 自動釋出，並以 Obtainium 在手機上安裝與更新不走 Play 商店的自製 App。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 了解如何自簽 Android APK、透過 GitHub Actions 自動釋出，並以 Obtainium 在手機上安裝與更新不走 Play 商店的自製 App。

item.title: Automating Android Repo Secrets with Val Town and GitHub Apps
item.description: How I stopped hand-wiring Android template repos by letting a Val Town GitHub App inject keystores and GitHub Action secrets the moment a repository is created.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: How I stopped hand-wiring Android template repos by letting a Val Town GitHub App inject keystores and GitHub Action secrets the moment a repository is created.

item.title: 用 Val Town + GitHub App 自動填滿 Android Repo Secrets
item.description: 分享如何把 Val Town 當作密鑰保險箱，讓 GitHub App 在建立新 Android 專案時自動灌入 keystore 與 Action secrets，首發就能跑 release workflow。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 分享如何把 Val Town 當作密鑰保險箱，讓 GitHub App 在建立新 Android 專案時自動灌入 keystore 與 Action secrets，首發就能跑 release workflow。

item.title: Multi-Agent Systems Beyond VSCode: A Pattern Emerges
item.description: VSCode custom agents, AutoGen, and agentic SDLC share a common architecture—specialized agents with structured handoffs. Discover why this pattern is becoming the standard for AI orchestration.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: VSCode custom agents, AutoGen, and agentic SDLC share a common architecture—specialized agents with structured handoffs. Discover why this pattern is becoming the standard for AI orchestration.

item.title: Why GitHub is Betting on 'Continuous AI' (And What It Means for You)
item.description: Continuous AI represents the next evolution after CI/CD—GitHub's vision for LLM-powered automation in software collaboration, and what developers need to know about the future of repository automation.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Continuous AI represents the next evolution after CI/CD—GitHub's vision for LLM-powered automation in software collaboration, and what developers need to know about the future of repository automation.

item.title: The Discovery Problem: How Will Agents Find Your WebMCP Tools?
item.description: WebMCP's biggest unsolved challenge is tool discovery—the future of agent-web interaction depends on solving how AI agents find your website's structured tools without expensive navigation.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: WebMCP's biggest unsolved challenge is tool discovery—the future of agent-web interaction depends on solving how AI agents find your website's structured tools without expensive navigation.

item.title: Choosing the Right AI Coding Agent: Remote, CLI, or IDE Mode?
item.description: A practical comparison of GitHub Copilot's remote coding agents, CLI mode, and VS Code agent mode based on real-world experience with Android development and automation tasks.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A practical comparison of GitHub Copilot's remote coding agents, CLI mode, and VS Code agent mode based on real-world experience with Android development and automation tasks.

item.title: AI 增強閱讀：用大型語言模型生成自訂書籍章節
item.description: 探索大型語言模型如何擴展你喜愛的書籍，透過經典思想的視角生成探索當代議題的新章節。學習如何在永恆智慧與現代挑戰之間搭建橋樑。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 探索大型語言模型如何擴展你喜愛的書籍，透過經典思想的視角生成探索當代議題的新章節。學習如何在永恆智慧與現代挑戰之間搭建橋樑。

item.title: AI-Enhanced Reading: Generating Custom Book Chapters with LLMs
item.description: Discover how large language models can extend your favorite books by generating new chapters that explore contemporary topics through the lens of classic ideas. Learn how to bridge the gap between timeless wisdom and modern challenges.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Discover how large language models can extend your favorite books by generating new chapters that explore contemporary topics through the lens of classic ideas. Learn how to bridge the gap between timeless wisdom and modern challenges.

item.title: 2025 年 VS Code Copilot 自訂設定完全指南
item.description: 實用的決策框架，幫助你了解何時使用 instructions、prompt files、custom agents、agent skills 和 MCP servers，讓 Copilot 在日常工作中保持一致、安全且實用。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 實用的決策框架，幫助你了解何時使用 instructions、prompt files、custom agents、agent skills 和 MCP servers，讓 Copilot 在日常工作中保持一致、安全且實用。

item.title: The 2025 Field Guide to Customizing Copilot in VS Code
item.description: A practical decision framework for when to use instructions, prompt files, custom agents, agent skills, and MCP servers—so Copilot stays consistent, safe, and useful across your day job.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A practical decision framework for when to use instructions, prompt files, custom agents, agent skills, and MCP servers—so Copilot stays consistent, safe, and useful across your day job.

item.title: Build First, Learn Later: How AI Changed the Way I Approach Software
item.description: AI enables a top-down, goal-first approach to software development. You can now build something real, then understand how it works — and that changes everything for developers.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: AI enables a top-down, goal-first approach to software development. You can now build something real, then understand how it works — and that changes everything for developers.

item.title: 先建構，後理解：AI 如何改變了我開發軟體的方式
item.description: AI 開創了一種由上而下、目標優先的軟體開發模式。你現在可以先建構出真實的成果，再去理解它的運作原理——這對開發者而言改變了一切。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: AI 開創了一種由上而下、目標優先的軟體開發模式。你現在可以先建構出真實的成果，再去理解它的運作原理——這對開發者而言改變了一切。

item.title: ACP and the Future of Coding Agents in Enterprise CI/CD
item.description: Why the Agent Client Protocol could become the standard way enterprise pipelines talk to coding agents, and why the CLI still makes architectural sense.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: Why the Agent Client Protocol could become the standard way enterprise pipelines talk to coding agents, and why the CLI still makes architectural sense.

item.title: Building a Copilot Control Plane with Tmux and Tailscale
item.description: How I wrapped Copilot CLI in a small desktop-hosted web app so I can delegate coding tasks from my phone without giving up control.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: How I wrapped Copilot CLI in a small desktop-hosted web app so I can delegate coding tasks from my phone without giving up control.

item.title: 用 Tmux 與 Tailscale 打造 Copilot 控制平面
item.description: 我如何把 Copilot CLI 包成一個由桌機代管的小型 Web App，讓我能從手機委派程式任務，同時保有控制權。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 我如何把 Copilot CLI 包成一個由桌機代管的小型 Web App，讓我能從手機委派程式任務，同時保有控制權。

item.title: PR Review in the Age of Coding Agents Should Start with Intent
item.description: When coding agents write much of the implementation, the real review target is not just the diff. It is whether the change still matches the user's intent, constraints, and project goals.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: When coding agents write much of the implementation, the real review target is not just the diff. It is whether the change still matches the user's intent, constraints, and project goals.

item.title: 在 Coding Agents 時代，PR Review 應該從 Intent 開始
item.description: 當 Coding Agent 寫出愈來愈多實作內容時，真正該審查的對象不只是 diff，而是這次變更是否仍然符合使用者意圖、限制條件與專案目標。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 當 Coding Agent 寫出愈來愈多實作內容時，真正該審查的對象不只是 diff，而是這次變更是否仍然符合使用者意圖、限制條件與專案目標。

item.title: The Agentic System Maturity Ladder: From Chatbots to Orchestrated AI
item.description: A framework for understanding the evolution of AI agents, from simple conversation models to sophisticated multi-agent orchestration systems.
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: A framework for understanding the evolution of AI agents, from simple conversation models to sophisticated multi-agent orchestration systems.

item.title: Agentic 系統成熟度階梯：從聊天機器人到編排式 AI
item.description: 用一套框架理解 AI agent 的演進：從簡單對話模型到可協同運作的多代理編排系統。
item.itunes:author: Min Wen
item.itunes:summary: 用一套框架理解 AI agent 的演進：從簡單對話模型到可協同運作的多代理編排系統。
